name: Shenzhen Longood Intelligent Electric Co.,LTD
summary: Shenzhen Longood Intelligent Electric Co.,LTD designs, manufactures, sells, and services electronic products in China and internationally. The company offers intelligent controllers and power supply products, battery management system (BMS) and battery packs, motors, and OEM assembly products. Its products are used in smart home appliances, power tools, lithium-ion battery BMS, LED and HID lighting, electrical motor systems, energy products, and other fields. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
